About Me

Passionate about
mathematics & teaching

I am an Applied Mathematics student at Bukhara University of Innovations, currently based in Samarkand, Uzbekistan. My academic journey is defined by a deep love for mathematical problem-solving — from classroom teaching to competing on the international stage.

I have won a First Prize at the 12th ITMO North Countries Universities Mathematical Competition and a Second Prize at OMOUS-2025 in Ashgabat, Turkmenistan.

Alongside my studies, I work as a Mathematics Teacher and have completed the Tashkent International Marathon — a testament to my discipline and endurance both in mind and body.
